rule.name: Entityframework Developer Exception Page Enabled
rule.vuln_desc: Detailed exception output in production can leak sensitive internals.
rule.developer: Enable developer exception page only in development environment.
rule.reviewer: Verify environment guard around UseDeveloperExceptionPage. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Entityframework Insecure Certificate Validation Callback
rule.rule_desc: Detects TLS certificate validation bypass patterns.
rule.vuln_desc: Bypassing certificate validation enables MITM attacks.
rule.developer: Remove bypass callbacks and enforce strict certificate validation.
rule.reviewer: Inspect all HTTP client handlers for certificate bypass. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Entityframework Raw SQL Execution Sink
rule.rule_desc: Detects raw SQL execution APIs in EF/.NET code.
rule.vuln_desc: Raw SQL with untrusted data can cause SQL injection.
rule.developer: Use parameter binding and input validation.
rule.reviewer: Review callsites for untrusted argument flow. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Entityframework Permissive CORS
rule.rule_desc: Detects overly broad CORS policy configuration.
rule.vuln_desc: Permissive CORS may expose APIs to malicious web origins.
rule.developer: Restrict CORS origins to known trusted domains.
rule.reviewer: Verify policy registration and environment overrides. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.

rule.name: Entityframework Hardcoded Secret Material
rule.vuln_desc: Hardcoded secrets may be exposed through source and logs.
rule.developer: Move secrets to secure configuration providers.
rule.reviewer: Review secret handling and rotate exposed values. This can be confirmed as an issue when the matched path is reachable and required controls are missing, weak, or inconsistent.
